title: Whimsical Dream
excerpt: Saw this gorgeous Ran Hwang installation in person and it is beyond amazing. It's now displayed hanging in panels against a wall, meticulously made up of what seems like billions of buttons suspended by the same amount of pins.
body: Saw this gorgeous Ran Hwang installation in person and it is beyond amazing. It's now displayed hanging in panels against a wall, meticulously made up of what seems like billions of buttons suspended by the same amount of pins.
